surface_verification.runner: uv run --extra dev pytest shared/tests/test_verifiers_common.py shared/tests/test_verify_iterate_finalization.py -p no:cacheprovider

behaviors.behavior: A verifier report whose detail carries '→' (e.g. check_architecture_documented) crashes a cp1252 console with UnicodeEncodeError (root cause)
ensure_utf8_stdout() reconfigures stdout to UTF-8 so the same '→'-bearing report prints without crashing
ensure_utf8_stdout() is a safe no-op when stdout is already UTF-8 / lacks reconfigure (never raises)
verify_iterate_finalization.main() pins stdout at entry, so a '→' finding prints + exits 1 under cp1252 (end-to-end wiring; guards against removal of the call)
behaviors.evidence: test_verifier_utf8_stdout.py::test_main_prints_arrow_report_under_cp1252_without_crashing PASSED + live repro: PYTHONIOENCODING=cp1252 verify_iterate_finalization.py ran clean (rc=1, no crash)
